situation: I hate my job but I am scared to quit and seek a new career.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Hello

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Hello, what would you like to talk about?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I am having a lot of anxiety about quitting my current job. It is too stressful but pays well

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: What makes your job stressful for you?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I have to deal with many people in hard financial situations and it is upsetting

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Do you help your clients to make it to a better financial situation?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I do, but often they are not going to get back to what they want. Many people are going to lose their home when safeguards are lifted

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: But you offer them a better future than what they have currently. It may not be what they wanted, but it helps them in the long run.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: That is true but sometimes I feel like I should put my feelings and health first

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I can understand that.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Is there another job that would pay you close to what you currently make?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Probably not. I was with the same company for a long time and I consistently get a bonus every year

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Is it possible to reframe how you look at your clients' dire financial situations?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I could try. It mostly gets to me at the end of the day

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Some people can't do what you do because they don't have the heart to give someone else bad news. The reality is though, someone needs to fill that role and you do help people

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: That is also true. Sometimes I wonder if it really is for me though

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I've had to deal with collections before when I was in  bad financial condition. The person on the other line was really helpful though. She was understanding,

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: It may not be for you. I think you should think about the pros and cons of keeping your position. It might make things clearer for you.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: That is true. Maybe I just need to sit down and really think about it

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I wouldn't stay if it really impacts your mental health in a negative way. Still, you may need to zoom out and see the bigger picture: that you provide a needed service and you do it compassionately

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: It really is a big decision

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Thank you for the different perspective

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: No doubt, but you know in your heart what is right for you.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: That is true. Thanks again

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Bye

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: It's no problem. I hope you can make a decision about this situation and then be at peace with it

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Ok, take care

seeker_question2: More guidance in conversation or examples

situation: I have complete unsupportive friends its to the point where i dont even feel like i have friends any more .

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Hello how are you?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: hello im looking for someone to talk to

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: im fine how are you

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I'm doing ok I'm glad you are good. Is it snowing by you?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Merry Christmas!

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: thats great and no its not snowing its very cold thow

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: merry christmas to you also

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: How can I help you today?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: im having some issues with friends not actually being friends

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I hear you are having trouble figuring out which friends are really your friends and which ones aren't. Is that about right?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: yes

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I understand that... Did something happen that makes you feel like that?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: yes their is no communication or interaction between me and them nobody answers phone calls txt messages etc

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Is this a significant other?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: no friends

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Are they ignoring you?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: when we where younger we all hung out all the time now that we are older its like they talk with each other im not sure if i did anything or not

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Are you sure they are okay? Or not away with family for the holidays?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: it doesnt matter they still keep open communication with each other

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: That's no good what do you think the problem is?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I believe its because I am the friend that has financial trouble and normally needs to borrow money

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Do you owe someone already?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: no anything i owe i always pay back

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: perhaps they are tired of being asked

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: That can get in the way of a friendship sometimes, but I try not to get ahead of myself and  jump the gun. They may have lost a phone or something may have come up...

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: That very well could be... Are you working?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: no im not currently

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I also think sometimes to myself that they don't answer because they think I'm asking for money

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I see, Have you tried for unemployment?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: yes i dont qualify

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I understand that. What if that is the case? You may need to talk to them and let them know how you feel about that.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: How long has this been going on?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I'm nervous about asking them why

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: and it happens on and off like when they feel lie it i guess i will say maybe 4 months

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I understand that, but if you want to get to a point that you feel better about it then you will have to speak to them.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: yes i know i hope everything be immediately resolved and not lead into other problems and end of friendshps

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Do you see them everyday?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I understand that, are you able to go over there.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: no i dont live in the same city anymore

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: when i go out of town i can visit but with covid19  rules

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Well I can see that you have put the effort in to try and keep the relationship so it sounds like the ball is in their court if they want to do the same.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: yes

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Well that is about all that can be done and wait for them to come around...Do you have  any hobbies?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: yes i like to read and play music

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I like to go on runs every morning. It helps to clear my mind and makes it easier to brush things off when they bother me.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: What instrument do you play?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: my sister goes on runs in the morning time and says it relax her for the day i think i migh

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: i played the piano when i was in highschool

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: It is a really good stress reliever. I played when I  was younger, didn't ever get very good. Did you?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: no i didn't i had to stop because i have what the doctors call a trigger finger it caused great pain when i would practice

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Hmm, well maybe take some more lessons, We can always strive to be better at everything we do.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: yes that is true

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Maybe take a run in order to clear your mind.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I'm sure they will come around.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: i think i would start off walking i am not in shape to run

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: yes i will give them time maybe stop reaching out so much

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: That may be a good idea. Good talk

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: yes thank you for talking with me and giving great advice

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: to them and may find out that it was never anything against you

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: yes maybe everyone is stressed at some level thanks to covid19

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I sometimes get ahead of myself and try to figure out what is going on and thinking that it was something I did. You are right too. COVID has stressed everyone out to the max.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: It has been a crazy year I am glad that it is almost over.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: yes i hope next year bring blessings for everyone

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I'm sure it will. Is there anything else I can help you with today?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: no that was all thanks for speaking with me

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: No problem, I hope everything works out for you and your friends. Have a great New Year!

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: you to and thanks

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Good day!

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: good bye

supporter_question2: The middle screen hover function gets in the way
